_fixture.rationale: Max balance lives nested 2-level deep inside getTransactionsAndGraphs response (result.totalCycle[currency=376].totalAmount). Real prod URL is 'getTransactionsAndGraphs?filterData=&firstCallCardIndex=-1null' — NO accountId in URL/postData/responseBody (the firstCallCardIndex=-1 is a broadcast-all-cards signal). Validates v5 attribution's BROADCAST channel: when the endpoint carries no WK_ACCT.id-aliased value anywhere, attribute to every iterating accountId. BALANCE-RESOLVE then applies F2 deep BFS + F5 ILS-first to pick the 376 row. Real values redacted: balance 100.00 (round synthetic, real value was non-round).
